name: Veazy Vaporizer
summary: Storz & Bickel's most compact hybrid vaporiser, for patients who want German build in a pocket size.
description: The Veazy is Storz & Bickel's lightest device at 134g, using a compact hybrid mini-heater that blends convection and conduction for smooth draws without combustion. Single-button operation and three preset temperatures keep it simple, with app support for finer control and a range from 40–210°C plus boost options. It heats in around 45 seconds from a ceramic-coated chamber, and comes in four finishes. It suits a patient who wants the reliability of the Mighty+ name in a far more portable, pocketable form. Three presets mean less granular control than dialled devices, with the app there if you want more.
